title: Carlube DPF (Diesel Particulate Filters) Cleaner, 300 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ENHANCES COMBUSTION AND FUEL EFFICIENCY: Improves combustion to boost fuel efficiency, helping your vehicle run smoother and more economically
PREVENTS SOOT FORMATION: Actively prevents soot buildup in diesel particulate filters, reducing the risk of blockage and maintaining optimal performance
CLEANS AND REGENERATES DPFs: Specially formulated to clean and regenerate dirty diesel particulate filters (DPFs), extending their lifespan and efficiency
AIDS IN DPF REGENERATION: Lowers the temperature required for soot particles to burn off, facilitating easier and more effective DPF regeneration
FOR VEHICLES WITH DPF ONLY: Designed specifically for vehicles equipped with diesel particulate filters—do not use in vehicles without a DPF
description: From the manufacturer Directions for Use: Add entire contents (300ml) to a minimum of 30 Liters of Diesel fuel in the fuel tank. Drive as normal then refuel. Use every 3000km (1864mi) for the best results. Note: Store in an upright position and secure when transported. Must not be used in vehicles without a DPF. Seek professional advice and assistance before using this product. Cleans and regenerates DPFs and prevents soot formation. Especially suited for city driving where natural regeneration is less likely to occur. Improves combustion & increases fuel efficiency.
